creator: billf@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is an unrealistic PR that cotains NO helpful information 
whatsoever. The submitter needs to get both a clue and a grasp of 
reality when filing a PR with nothing, yet having 'critical severity' 
and 'high priority' settings set. 

In conclusion, e-mail freebsd-questions@FreeBSD.org and try to actually 
provide some substance.
